name: Maids of Honour Cakes
recipeIngredient: 1 Lemon Zest (the grated rind of one lemon)
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil the milk and bread crumbs together for 10 minutes.
2. Add the butter, almonds, sugar, and mix well.
3. Beat in the eggs one at a time.
4. Place dessert spoonfuls of the mixture on top of the puff paste.
5. Bake until golden brown.
Notes:
Maids of Honour cakes are believed to have originated in 1525 when Henry VIII saw maids of honor eating cakes with great enjoyment and tried one himself, finding it delicious. Another theory suggests they were named after Queen Elizabeth's maids of honor during her time at Richmond Palace. Modern versions can be found throughout Britain, but the version from Richmond is particularly famous for its rich flavor.
